items.title: Dry Eye Treatment Devices Market Poised to Attain Valuation of US$ 898.78 Million By 2033 | Pharmacological Synergy Driving Demand for Advanced Dry Eye Treatment Devices Says Astute Analytica
items.author: Astute Analytica
items.description: The global dry eye treatment devices market is expected to reach $898.78 million by 2033, driven by the increasing prevalence of dry eye disease and the development of innovative treatment options. The market is seeing a shift towards more sophisticated devices that offer targeted therapies, such as the LipiFlow System and iLux Device for treating meibomian gland dysfunction, and the trueTear intranasal neurostimulation device for stimulating tear production.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Johnson & Johnson Vision Care is mentioned as one of the major players in the dry eye treatment devices market, indicating its involvement and potential growth opportunities in this market.
Sight Sciences is mentioned as one of the major players in the dry eye treatment devices market, indicating its involvement and potential growth opportunities in this market.

items.title: Digital PCR Market Size Expected to Reach USD 17.45 Bn by 2034
items.author: Towards Healthcare
items.description: The global digital PCR market is expected to grow from $7.82 billion in 2025 to $17.45 billion by 2034, driven by factors such as the launch of new products, increased acquisitions, and the rising incidence of infectious diseases, cancer, and genetic disorders.

items.title: Wound Closure Market Size to Hit USD 26.63 Billion by 2032, Growing at a CAGR of 6.47% - SNS Insider
items.author: Sns Insider
items.description: The global Wound Closure Market is expected to grow from $15.17 billion in 2023 to $26.63 billion by 2032, driven by increasing chronic wounds, aging population, and rising healthcare infrastructure. Sutures and hemostatic agents are the key product types, with general surgery and cardiology being the major application areas.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company is a major player in the wound closure market, offering products like Ethicon Sutures, Dermabond, and Prolene.
Medtronic is a prominent player in the wound closure market, providing products like Endo Stitch, V-Loc Sutures, and AbsorbaTack.
3M is a key player in the wound closure market, offering products such as Steri-Strips and Precise Skin Stapler.
Smith+Nephew is a major manufacturer of wound closure products, including PDS II Sutures, Endo Clip, and Allevyn.
Stryker is a key manufacturer of wound closure products, including Stryker Staplers and FlexTack.
Baxter is a major player in the wound closure market, offering products such as TachoSil and Floseal.
Boston Scientific Corporation is a prominent manufacturer of wound closure products, including Resolution Clip and EndoClip.
Intuitive Surgical is a prominent player in the wound closure market, offering Robotic Surgical Instruments and EndoWrist Suturing.

items.title: Mouth Freshener Market to Reach USD 36.33 Billion by 2035 – Key Trends, Emerging Opportunities, and Competitive Outlook | FMI
items.author: Fmi
items.description: The global mouth freshener market is expected to reach USD 36.33 billion by 2035, growing at a CAGR of 6.7% from 2025 to 2035. The rising demand is driven by increased consumer awareness of oral hygiene and the growing use of tobacco and alcohol.
